scripts.build: python3 scripts/build_player_profiles.py && node scripts/snapshot-odds.mjs && next build
scripts.cf:build: python3 scripts/build_player_profiles.py && node scripts/snapshot-odds.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare build
scripts.cf:deploy: python3 scripts/build_player_profiles.py && node scripts/snapshot-odds.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
